contract_claim: L162: parameter `Triage.__init__.executor` — None of the 16 deduplicated call sites pass `executor`. Every caller either passes no optional args (call site 1), passes only `rate_limiter` (call site 2), or passes only `provider` (call sites 5–16). The parameter's only use in the body is the inline expression `executor or ExplorationExecutor(config)`, which always resolves to `ExplorationExecutor(config)` because `executor` is always `None`.
observed_behavior: Remove the `executor` parameter and replace the assignment with `self.executor = ExplorationExecutor(config)` unconditionally. No full if-block is gated — only the inline `or` expression simplifies.
